reasoning: Koren, let's target your poor lactate clearance and underdeveloped aerobic base by focusing on over-unders today. Given your 8-day rest, we'll reduce intensity slightly to reintroduce load without risk of fatigue. This will mimic the demands of the 8.5-mile climb on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 sets of 5-min over-unders: 3 mins at 201-218W, followed by 2 mins at 242-256W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
